text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while training for the Arima Kinen, Nice
Nature spots Tokai Teio working hard in physical
therapy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Teio never stops working hard, no matter what
the situation, but Mayano Top Gun tells us that
she still cried tears of frustration when first
injured.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature realizes that the difference between
herself and Teio is a matter of mustering the
strength to stand back up on one's own.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In this, her desire to leave her weak self behind
and claim her own victory grows stronger.
